rationale: The skill centers on writing CloudFormation templates (YAML/JSON) and invoking the AWS CLI to manage stacks, so the agent will read and write template files in the working directory. CLI commands like create-stack, update-stack, and describe-stack-events spawn the `aws` binary, which reads credentials from ~/.aws/ and connects to regional CloudFormation API endpoints under amazonaws.com. No deletions of local files are implied; stack deletion happens remotely via API. Documentation references may also trigger fetches to docs.aws.amazon.com.
